name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILY's List
subject: This kind of chance doesn't come often >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e51/24c69fd9/f1aaa1f5/18e35995/1397350449/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE402N_digital_email_20170403_Ellen_inact&source=WQEFE402N_digital_email_20170403_Ellen_inact")
---

Peter,

Not much can surprise me.

But when I heard that in just four months, over 10,000 women had reached out to EMILY's List about running for office, you could have knocked me over with a feather.

That's a wave if ever there was one. And they don't come around often -- so I've been doing all I can to make sure we can meet the energy and enthusiasm of the women who are ready to put their names on a ballot.

Right now that means making sure we have the resources to help these women run through our new program, Run to Win. Just like it took months of individual women reaching out for this to grow into a wave, every dollar you chip in builds up to fund the programs we need to recruit, train, and elect more pro-choice Democratic women than ever before.

**[Movements are built by people taking small actions that add up to big change. Donate $3 to be a part of the movement we're building right now.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e51/24c69fd9/f1aaa1f5/18e35996/1397350449/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170402_email_Ellen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Movements+are+built+by+people+taking+sma&utm_campaign=WQEFE402N_digital_email_20170403_Ellen_inact&source=WQEFE402N_digital_email_20170403_Ellen_inact")**

I've been lucky enough to be a part of a few political waves.

There was 1992 -- the Year of the Woman. Women across the country were outraged by an all-male Senate panel's treatment of Anita Hill. So they started sending their money to EMILY's List, and they started running. We elected more women to Congress than ever before. In fact, we quintupled the number of Democratic women in the Senate that year.

There was 2006, when the country was so frustrated with the Bush administration's incompetence that Democrats took back the House and installed the first woman speaker, Nancy Pelosi. And in 2012, we helped elect the first openly gay woman to the Senate and the second woman of color -- and both Tammy Baldwin and Mazie Hirono are up for re-election this year.

Most of the time change happens bit by bit. Then, every few years, there's a chance to take a huge leap forward.

**Donate $3 to help build the infrastructure we need to elect more women than ever before:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Build-A-Movement](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e51/24c69fd9/f1aaa1f5/18e35997/1397350449/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170402_email_Ellen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgBuildAMovement&utm_campaign=WQEFE402N_digital_email_20170403_Ellen_inact&source=WQEFE402N_digital_email_20170403_Ellen_inact")**

Thank you,

Ellen R. Malcolm
Founder and Chair of the Board

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e51/24c69fd9/f1aaa1f5/18e35990/1397350449/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170402_email_Ellen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE402N_digital_email_20170403_Ellen_inact&source=WQEFE402N_digital_email_20170403_Ellen_inact")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Opening Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
body:
Peter,
When I was growing up, going to Cardinals games was a rare treat. I still remember those games--the big lights, the hot dogs, the energy in the stadium, the cheers when the Cards scored.
That's why yesterday, when we were invited to the Cardinals home opener, we decided to do different. We invited three children whose parents are overseas serving in Missouri's National Guard to join us for Opening Day.

[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=2b46da7ef6&e=84041254e6)
They got to meet the players on the field during batting practice, play catch with the players, and they even snagged an autograph from Willie McGee. And, of course, they got to watch as the Cardinals defeated the Cubs. We even got to FaceTime one of the dads serving overseas who saw his son on the field for the big game! It's so important that we support our state's military families, and this was a fun way to do it!

Check out [this video](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=df3cba1ff9&e=84041254e6) the Cardinals organization put together of our time together yesterday.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=4c6064430a&e=84041254e6)
Yours in service,
Eric Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=938b113d05&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=8cfe3510a1&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=9e96fd2af2).

body:
Everything White House for 4/04/2017. |
WHITE HOUSE MEMOAs President Donald J. Trump traveled the nation, he heard the pleas of the forgotten men and women of the country – the people who work hard, and play by the rules, but who don’t have a voice. Today, he will deliver remarks to North America’s Building Trades Unions. These men and women are the backbone of America. They will play a key role in the rebuilding of our nation – and they will never be forgotten again.

body:
This is all hands on deck. |

EMERGENCY: Dems look to Georgia to test anti-Trump strategy Friend, on April 18, there is a special election to replace Tom Price and Democrats think they have a real shot at winning this seat -- for the first time since 1979! Thanks to the fake news and Hollywood liberals, Democrats have already raised over $4 million in their efforts to retake GA-6. But we’re fighting back to defend our President! We’re setting up shop all over Georgia and sending field staff to make sure that President Trump’s historic get-out-the-vote operation continues, but we need your help. We need $157,493 by midnight tomorrow to make sure that we have the resources necessary to stop this race from being the beginning of the Democrats’ anti-Trump plan. Friend, help us defend President Trump by contributing now: Contribute $1 Friend, this is the district of former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich and Secretary of Health and Human Services Tom Price. We need to be sure we elect another strong Pro-Trump conservative to advance the President’s America First agenda across the country. Help us win this fight for our President. Be a part of our victory in GA-6 by making a contribution of just $1 today. Thank you for your support of the party and our President, Trump Headquarters Georgia Grassroots

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Where I stand on Gorsuch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
At the foundation of our American democracy is the principle that every person counts. Cases that come before the Supreme Court touch millions of lives, and each of those lives counts.
One of the Senate's most solemn Constitutional duties is to provide advice and consent on the President's nominees to the Supreme Court.
To that end, I have considered the record of President Trump's nominee to the Supreme Court, Judge Neil Gorsuch. I studied his record and his testimony before the Judiciary Committee, I met with him in my office, and I have heard from people across New Hampshire regarding his nomination.
After careful examination, I have concluded that Judge Gorsuch has failed to demonstrate the judicial approach needed in a Supreme Court justice. I will vote against his confirmation.
[**Will you join me and add your name to my petition to oppose Judge Gorsuch 's confirmation?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd67/2a380d31/15b0fe33/fee035/425119220/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170404_gorsuch-confirmation?source=e20170404_confirm1_all&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Judge Gorsuch has a history of siding with big corporations, and his record demonstrates that he has too often shown a disregard for the impact that his decisions have on the lives of real Americans.
He has ruled against the rights of people with disabilities, he has failed to commit to upholding the precedent of _Roe v. Wade_ , and he has provided only vague responses to questions about the disastrous _Citizens United _decision.
[**Please, we need a Supreme Court justice who will rise above partisanship and protect our country's core values. Add your name to oppose this nomination and support the traditional 60-vote threshold for confirming Supreme Court nominees.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd67/2a380d31/15b0fe33/fee035/425119220/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170404_gorsuch-confirmation?source=e20170404_confirm1_all&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for speaking out.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Merrick Garland's SCOTUS seat
body:
Tell the Senate to reject Neil Gorsuch's nomination.
---
**Add your name: tell the Senate to reject Judge Gorsuch's nomination.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170404_dnc_nd&source=em_20170404_dnc_nd")**
Friend --

When Senate Democrats deny Neil Gorsuch the 60 votes he needs to be confirmed as a Supreme Court justice, it won't be payback for the way Republicans treated Merrick Garland. It will be because of Gorsuch's record.

Right-wing groups are spending millions of dollars to prop up Gorsuch because of his support for defunding Planned Parenthood, his ruling that employers should be able to deny coverage for contraception for their employees, and his record of opposing LGBT rights.

He has made decisions that determined corporations are people and punished hardworking employees for taking steps to save their own lives -- or, as Senator Chuck Schumer put it, Gorsuch "prefers CEOs over truck drivers, executives over employers, and corporations over consumers."

It's no wonder why Trump nominated Neil Gorsuch. And there's no doubt why every Republican on the Senate Judiciary Committee voted yesterday to move him ahead to a full vote on the Senate floor. They see the same things we do -- but they view Gorsuch's anti-woman, anti-LGBT, anti-worker record as a reason to put him on the Supreme Court for life.

**So far, more than 227,478 Democrats have stood with Senate Democrats to reject Gorsuch's nomination to the Supreme Court -- add your name to join them:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170404_dnc_nd&source=em_20170404_dnc_nd")**

name: Al Franken
subject: As a trained satirist...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
When it comes to stopping Trump's agenda, we Democratic Senators know that we're the last, best line of defense. And we're committed to holding that line every day.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170404-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

As a trained satirist, I have a lot of experience identifying absurdities. And, boy, has the Trump administration offered up plenty of those. But as a Senator, it's not enough to identify absurdities -- it's my job to confront them head-on.

Just recently, for example, I took on President Trump's Supreme Court nominee, Neil Gorsuch, over his -- there's no other word for it -- absurd decision allowing a trucking company to fire a worker for refusing to freeze to death in a broken-down vehicle.

Now, I'm not a lawyer. But you don't need to be a lawyer to know that a nominee who consistently puts corporate interests ahead of those of working Americans simply doesn't have the judgment to serve on the Supreme Court.

And, frankly, you don't need to be a trained satirist to spot the deluge of ludicrous, preposterous, and downright ridiculous policies, statements, and even tweets coming from Trump and his henchmen.

But when it comes to stopping Trump's agenda, we Democratic Senators know that we're the last, best line of defense. And we're committed to holding that line every day.

**[We can't do it without you. Please click here to stand with us by helping to elect and protect Democratic Senators in 2018!](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170404-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

We're not going to win every fight against President Trump and his allies. But we're going to _fight_ every fight.

Whether it's a nominee with a record of putting profits over people or a health care bill that would hurt tens of millions of American families, we're going to use our voices, our votes, and every other tool at our disposal (including, where applicable, any comedic training we might have) to stand up to this administration.

**And we need you with us.**

**[Click here to donate today!](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170404-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for all you do.

Al

P.S. Calling out President Trump and his pals is satisfying. But we have to be able to back it up with real grassroots action. That's where you come in. **[Please click here today to make a contribution to the DSCC so we can stand strong against the Trump administration!](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170404-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

name: DNC War Room
subject: re: Trump's war on the environment (add your name)
body:
Trump's agenda spells disaster for our planet.
---
**Add your name to stand with Democrats and protect the environment.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-the-Environment1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170404_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170404_dnc3_nd")**
If you want a clear example of the dangerous chaos Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are creating, look no further than the war they're waging on the environment.

Over the past couple of weeks, Trump has proposed cutting the Environmental Protection Agency's funding by 31 percent and greenlit the Keystone XL pipeline. Meanwhile, House Republicans voted last week to handcuff the EPA's ability to create regulations based on scientific evidence.

And on the same day that House Republicans held that ridiculous anti-science vote, EPA chief Scott Pruitt denied a petition to ban chlorpyrifos -- a pesticide that can cause seizures, lung failure, and paralysis in children and farm workers.

Trump -- who believes climate change is "a hoax" -- also wants to back out of the Paris Climate Agreement, which Pruitt called "a bad deal" on Fox News this past Sunday. But even the top three U.S. coal producers and ExxonMobil have told Trump that this is a bad idea. (Congratulations to Donald Trump on bringing Big Coal, Big Oil, and climate scientists together!)

**Trump, Pruitt, and the GOP think they can let polluters run roughshod over the environment and put children and working people at risk. Let's show the GOP that when it comes to protecting our planet for future generations, we mean business:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-the-Environment1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170404_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170404_dnc3_nd")**

This is an important fight. Thank you so much for stepping up today.

The Democrats

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170404dnc3nd&source=em20170404dnc3nd") If you want a clear example of the dangerous chaos Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are creating, look no further than the war they're waging on the environment. Over the past couple of weeks, Trump has proposed cutting the Environmental Protection Agency's funding by 31 percent and greenlit the Keystone XL pipeline. Meanwhile, House Republicans voted last week to handcuff the EPA's ability to create regulations based on scientific evidence. And on the same day that House Republicans held that ridiculous anti-science vote, EPA chief Scott Pruitt denied a petition to ban chlorpyrifos -- a pesticide that can cause seizures, lung failure, and paralysis in children and farm workers. Trump -- who believes climate change is "a hoax" -- also wants to back out of the Paris Climate Agreement, which Pruitt called "a bad deal" on Fox News this past Sunday. But even the top three U.S. coal producers and ExxonMobil have told Trump that this is a bad idea. (Congratulations to Donald Trump on bringing Big Coal, Big Oil, and climate scientists together!) Trump, Pruitt, and the GOP think they can let polluters run roughshod over the environment and put children and working people at risk. Let's show the GOP that when it comes to protecting our planet for future generations, we mean business: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170404dnc3nd&source=em20170404dnc3nd") This is an important fight. Thank you so much for stepping up today. Team -- This week, the Senate will consider whether to confirm Donald Trump's nominee, Neil Gorsuch, to the Supreme Court.
Mitch McConnell has publicly promised to confirm Gorsuch no matter what it takes -- even invoking the nuclear option, which would change the rules of the Senate and allow a nominee to be confirmed with a 51-vote majority instead of the traditional 60 votes.
**We just looked -- your name is missing from the petition that Senator Hassan sent around earlier today. [Add your name to oppose Judge Gorsuch's confirmation and support the traditional 60-vote threshold for Supreme Court nominees.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd64/2a380d31/15b5edb8/fee0c0/3681825303/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170404_gorsuch-confirmation?source=e20170404_confirm2_v1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Now more than ever, we need a Supreme Court Justice who will look out for hard-working Americans, not kowtow to Donald Trump's extreme agenda and dangerous policies.
Gorsuch has ruled against the rights of people with disabilities, failed to commit to upholding the precedent of _Roe v. Wade_ , and provided only vague responses to questions about the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision.
[**Please, add your name to tell Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump that we should not deploy the nuclear option to ram through a Supreme Court confirmation for Judge Gorsuch.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd64/2a380d31/15b5edb8/fee0c0/3681825303/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170404_gorsuch-confirmation?source=e20170404_confirm2_v1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for making your voice heard about the future of the Supreme Court.
-- Team Maggie
